⚡ Top 50 BINs · Most Soft Declines (Excl. Insufficient Funds)
Soft declines only — insufficient_funds excluded. Includes NMI (ECS + Luqra) and Braintree. Shows which BINs have systemic soft decline issues beyond cash problems: do-not-honor, velocity, authorization holds, etc.

Volume Lost — Soft vs Hard ($)
Decline Category Detail
Period Total Declines Soft Count Soft Vol Lost Soft % Fraud Count Fraud % Hard Count Hard Vol Lost Hard % Do Not Honor DNH Vol Lost
Soft / Non-Fraud: insufficient_funds, do_not_honor, generic_decline, try_again_later, card_velocity_exceeded, transaction_not_allowed and other retriable bank declines.  |  Hard / Card Issue: expired_card, incorrect_cvc, incorrect_number, invalid_account.  |  Vol Lost = total attempted transaction value that was declined in that category.
